title: Draught Excluder Door Window Draft Seal 1x Twin Pack White Self-Adhesive Foam Tape. Simple DIY Fix For Windows & Doors. Save Energy & Money L5m x W9mm
description: Protect your home from unwanted heat loss with this easy DIY fix for sealing draughty gaps on all windows and doors, helping you to save energy. The package contains 2 rolls of foam strips with self-adhesive easy peel backing, together measuring 5m long x 9mm wide - simply peel, apply and cut to size!
